Localization.Description: Check of access to the repository when using LFS

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} was authorized when downloading files from the repository "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} was authorized when uploading files to the repository "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to be authorized when downloading files from the repository "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to be authorized when uploading files to the repository "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
